title: I Bombed Pearl Harbor
actors: Yôsuke Natsuki, Toshirô Mifune, Kôji Tsuruta
plot: Lt. Koji Kitami is a navigator-bombardier in Japan's Naval Air Force. He participates in the Japanese raid on the U.S. Naval Base at Pearl Harbor in 1941 and is welcomed with pride in his hometown on his return. As Japan racks up ...
